ops.text:
VERIFY LANE (independent recompute, $0, no model load) — VERDICT: CONFIRMED. 2026-07-19.

Re-derived every headline number from the RAW persisted per-row probs (out/fullframe_scores.npz) with my OWN code (venv: cc-steer-prep, uv run --no-sync), NOT the harness's fast-DeLong. Implementations: (a) sklearn roc_auc_score; (b) a naive O(m*n) DeLong (psi kernel + placement values V10/V01 + 2x2 AUC-covariance) — a fully independent algorithm from the Sun&Xu fast-midrank one in fullframe.py; (c) a fresh-seed paired stratified bootstrap (B=20000, seed=20260719).

FRAME: n=628, positives=335, negatives=293 — matches (frame_digest e85dc4a2ec94aae0 in summary).
INSTRUMENT: max|p_base - stored| = 0.0 EXACT (reproduces the base=stored v002 claim). max|fire_base-(1-p_base)|=0.0, max|fire_steer-(1-p_steer)|=0.0.

AUC (sentinel = fire = 1-P(NO_STEER)):
- sklearn auc_base=0.9316896744944222, auc_steer=0.9062859762620346, delta=-0.02540369823238764 — byte-identical to summary.
- naive-DeLong AUCs agree to <=1e-16 float rounding.

Paired DeLong (my naive impl vs claimed):
- se_base 0.009981676031609831 == claimed EXACT
- se_steer 0.011941544811239779 == claimed EXACT
- cov_bs 0.00010306931535000545 vs 0.00010306931535000547 (1e-19)
- se_delta 0.0060079712198754 == claimed 0.006007971219875388
- rho 0.8646998992070196 == claimed 0.8646998992070197
- z -4.22833221110 == claimed -4.228332211104475
- mde_paired 0.0168319321696 == claimed 0.016831932169602888
- CI95 [-0.0371793, -0.0136281] vs claimed [-0.03717910544, -0.01362829102]; diff ~2e-7 solely because I used z=1.96 and the harness used the exact normal quantile 1.959964 (norm.ppf(0.975)). Negligible; both bounds strictly negative either way.

Fresh-seed paired bootstrap cross-check: mean delta -0.02537, se 0.006035 (vs DeLong 0.006008), percentile CI95 [-0.03763, -0.01408], P(delta>=0)=0/20000. Corroborates the DeLong CI and the resolved-negative direction.

SECONDARY claims all reproduce: intervention 468/628 rows |move|>0.01, mean|move| 0.0881, max|move| 0.5595, mean P(NO_STEER) 0.3603->0.4192. alpha=-16/norm[8]=-16/36.2943=-0.44084047912965013 == config.alpha EXACT. Golden best by max delta_vs_base = L8·mag16·- (auc 0.6289, delta +0.2089), baseline 0.42 — matches eval_auc.json and best_config.

CRITERION AS REGISTERED: paired DeLong on both arms' per-row probs on the identical 628-row frame; ACTIONABLE iff CI excludes 0 AND |delta|>=paired MDE (2.8016*SE_delta at measured rho). Golden screen was pre-registered report-only (eval_auc.json min_delta_e15=null, note 'report-only') and used only to pick one config, never verdicted — as registered. CARD RULE correctly applied: ci_excludes_zero=TRUE AND |delta| 0.02540 >= paired MDE 0.01683 => resolved beyond noise floor; direction NEGATIVE => RESOLVED NEGATIVE (actionable loss), NOT a promotion candidate. Preferring the paired MDE over the unpaired card MDE 0.0453 is correct (both arms' probs persisted on the identical frame). No LLM spend.
